tasks.title: Project Setup and Dependencies Installation
tasks.description: Install all required npm packages and configure environment variables for the stock analysis application
tasks.details:
Install dependencies:
- yahoo-finance2 (stock data for US/KR markets)
- @anthropic-ai/sdk (Claude API for Brick generation)
- recharts (interactive charts)
- cheerio (web scraping for Naver Finance)
- html2canvas (chart export)
- @radix-ui/react-* packages for shadcn/ui base components
- lucide-react (icons)
- zod (validation)
- clsx + tailwind-merge (className utility)

Create .env.local with:
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=
DART_API_KEY=
FINNHUB_API_KEY=

Create .env.example template for documentation.

Install commands:
npm install yahoo-finance2 @anthropic-ai/sdk recharts cheerio html2canvas
npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-switch @radix-ui/react-toast lucide-react
npm install zod clsx tailwind-merge
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all packages appear in package.json dependencies. Run npm install without errors. Check .env.local exists with placeholder keys.

tasks.title: TypeScript Interfaces and Types
tasks.description: Define core TypeScript interfaces for Brick architecture, financial data, and stock information
tasks.testStrategy: TypeScript compiles without errors. Import types in a test file to verify exports work correctly.

tasks.title: Brick Registry Infrastructure
tasks.description: Create the Brick registry system with directory structure and registry.json management utilities
tasks.testStrategy: Create registry.json, call loadRegistry() and verify it returns empty array. Add a test entry, call updateRegistry(), read file to verify JSON is written correctly.

tasks.title: shadcn/ui Component Setup
tasks.description: Initialize shadcn/ui and install required UI components (Button, Input, Card, Tabs, Dialog, Switch, Toast)
tasks.details:
Run shadcn/ui init:
npx shadcn@latest init -d

When prompted, select:
- Style: Default
- Base color: Slate
- CSS variables: Yes

Add components:
npx shadcn@latest add button
npx shadcn@latest add input
npx shadcn@latest add card
npx shadcn@latest add tabs
npx shadcn@latest add dialog
npx shadcn@latest add switch
npx shadcn@latest add toast
npx shadcn@latest add skeleton
npx shadcn@latest add badge
npx shadcn@latest add dropdown-menu

This will create src/components/ui/ with all base components.

Create src/lib/utils.ts if not already present:
import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
}
tasks.testStrategy: Verify src/components/ui/ directory exists with all component files. Import Button in a test component and verify it renders without errors.

tasks.title: Stock Search API Route
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/stocks/search endpoint using yahoo-finance2 for ticker and company name search
tasks.testStrategy: Test endpoint with curl or Postman: GET /api/stocks/search?q=AAPL (should return Apple), GET /api/stocks/search?q=005930 (should return Samsung with .KS suffix). Verify response format matches interface.

tasks.title: Stock Quote API Route
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/stocks/[ticker] endpoint to fetch real-time stock quotes with all required fields
tasks.testStrategy: Test with GET /api/stocks/AAPL and GET /api/stocks/005930.KS. Verify all required fields are present and properly typed. Check that KR stocks return KRW currency.

tasks.title: Stock Financials API Routes (US + KR)
tasks.description: Implement financial statements endpoints for both US stocks (yahoo-finance2) and Korean stocks (OpenDART API)
tasks.testStrategy: Test US stock: GET /api/stocks/AAPL/financials?period=annual. Test KR stock: GET /api/stocks/005930.KS/dart with valid DART_API_KEY. Verify data structure matches FinancialData interface.

tasks.title: Stock News API Routes (US + KR)
tasks.description: Implement news endpoints using Finnhub for US stocks and Naver Finance scraping for Korean stocks
tasks.testStrategy: Test US: GET /api/stocks/AAPL/news (verify Finnhub integration). Test KR: GET /api/stocks/005930.KS/news (verify Naver scraping works). Check that articles include date, headline, source, url.

tasks.title: Home Page with Stock Search
tasks.description: Build the home page (/) with centered search bar, recent searches from localStorage, and market index summary
tasks.details:
Create src/components/stock-search.tsx: - Debounced search input (300ms delay) - Calls /api/stocks/search on input change - Dropdown showing results with ticker, name, exchange - Click navigates to /stock/[ticker] - Stores recent searches in localStorage 'recent-searches' (max 5) Create src/components/market-summary.tsx: - Displays 4 cards: KOSPI (^KS11), KOSDAQ (^KQ11), S&P 500 (^GSPC), NASDAQ (^IXIC) - Each card shows: index value, change, changePercent - Fetches from /api/stocks/[ticker] for each index - Auto-refresh every 60 seconds - Use from shadcn/ui Update src/app/page.tsx: export default function HomePage() { return (

Stock Analysis Tool

) }
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to /. Type 'AAPL' in search, verify dropdown appears. Click result, verify navigation to /stock/AAPL. Refresh page, verify recent searches persist. Check that market indices load and display correctly.

tasks.title: Stock Detail Page Layout and Overview Card
tasks.description: Create stock detail page with 2-column layout and StockOverview component showing real-time quote data
tasks.details:
Create src/app/stock/[ticker]/page.tsx: export default async function StockPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ ticker: string }> }) { const { ticker } = await params return (
) } Create src/components/stock-overview.tsx: 'use client' import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card' export function StockOverview({ ticker }: { ticker: string }) { const [quote, setQuote] = useState(null) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) useEffect(() => { async function fetchQuote() { const res = await fetch(`/api/stocks/${ticker}`) const data = await res.json() setQuote(data) setLoading(false) } fetchQuote() const interval = setInterval(fetchQuote, 60000) // Auto-refresh every 60s return () => clearInterval(interval) }, [ticker]) if (loading) return if (!quote) return
Failed to load
return ( {quote.name} ({quote.ticker})

Price

${quote.price.toFixed(2)}

= 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}> {quote.change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{quote.change.toFixed(2)} ({quote.changePercent.toFixed(2)}%)

Market Cap

{formatLargeNumber(quote.marketCap)}

P/E Ratio

{quote.pe?.toFixed(2) || 'N/A'}

52W Range

{quote.low52.toFixed(2)} - {quote.high52.toFixed(2)}

 ) }
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to /stock/AAPL. Verify StockOverview card displays with price, change, market cap, P/E, 52W range. Wait 60 seconds, verify data refreshes automatically. Test with Korean stock /stock/005930.KS.

tasks.title: Brick Renderer Component
tasks.description: Create BrickRenderer component that dynamically loads and displays all enabled Bricks from registry in order
tasks.testStrategy: Create a test Brick, add it to registry.json with enabled:true. Navigate to stock page, verify Brick renders. Set enabled:false, refresh page, verify Brick doesn't render. Throw error in Brick component, verify ErrorBoundary catches it without crashing page.

tasks.title: Financial Statements System Brick
tasks.description: Implement the financial-statements Brick with tabs for Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow with customizable fields
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to stock page, verify Financial Statements Brick renders with 3 tabs. Toggle Annual/Quarterly, verify data refetches. Check/uncheck field visibility, refresh page, verify settings persist. Test both US and KR stocks.

tasks.title: Interactive Chart System Brick
tasks.description: Build interactive-chart Brick using Recharts with zoom, hover tooltips, multi-series comparison, and PNG export
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to stock page, verify chart renders. Select different metrics, verify chart updates. Toggle chart types (Bar/Line/Area), verify rendering. Drag to zoom on chart, verify zoom works. Click Reset Zoom, verify returns to full view. Click Export PNG, verify image downloads.

tasks.title: Metrics Calculator System Brick
tasks.description: Implement metrics-calculator Brick with built-in metrics (PER, EPS, PBR, ROE, Debt Ratio, Current Ratio) and custom formula support
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to stock page, verify built-in metrics calculate correctly using mock data. Click 'Add Formula', enter custom formula 'revenue * 0.2', verify it calculates. Delete custom metric, verify it's removed. Test formula validation with invalid syntax.

tasks.title: News System Brick
tasks.description: Create news Brick with All/Positive/Negative tabs, pagination, and sentiment filtering
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to stock page, verify news Brick loads articles. Click Positive tab, verify only positive articles show. Click Negative tab, verify filtering works. Test pagination by clicking Next/Previous. Verify external links open in new tab.

tasks.title: Brick Management API Routes
tasks.description: Implement API routes for registry management: GET/PUT /api/bricks/registry, custom metrics CRUD endpoints
tasks.testStrategy: Test GET /api/bricks/registry returns current registry. Test PUT with enabled=false, verify registry.json updates. Test POST /api/bricks/metrics with new metric, verify custom-metrics.json updates. Test DELETE, verify metric removed.

tasks.title: AI Agent Brick Creation System
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/agent/create-brick endpoint using Anthropic Claude API to generate new Brick modules from natural language prompts
tasks.testStrategy: Test POST /api/agent/create-brick with prompt '현금흐름지수를 계산해줘'. Verify new directory created in src/bricks/ with all required files. Verify registry.json updated. Navigate to stock page, verify new Brick appears and renders. Test with another prompt to ensure it works consistently.

tasks.title: Brick Manager and Agent Prompt UI Components
tasks.description: Build BrickManager for toggling/reordering Bricks and AgentPrompt for natural language Brick creation requests
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to stock page. Enter prompt in AgentPrompt, verify loading state shows. After success, verify toast notification appears and new Brick renders. In BrickManager, toggle a Brick off, refresh page, verify Brick doesn't render. Toggle back on, verify it reappears. Delete an AI-generated Brick, verify it's removed from list and filesystem. Try to delete system Brick, verify it's prevented.
